heading: DEFINITIONS

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: the fuel ethanol, renewable methane, biodiesel, and renewable diesel production account
the American Society for Testing and Materials
methane gas derived from animal waste or an agricultural byproduct, including creamery or fruit waste or corn silage
